targets.rawSql: SELECT NOW() AS time, COALESCE(SUM(pnl), 0)::float AS value FROM butterfly_trades WHERE status='CLOSED' AND trade_date = CURRENT_DATE AND underlying IN ('SPX', 'NDX', 'XSP')
SELECT NOW() AS time, COALESCE(SUM(pnl), 0)::float AS value FROM butterfly_trades WHERE status='CLOSED' AND underlying='SPX' AND trade_date = CURRENT_DATE
SELECT NOW() AS time, COALESCE(SUM(pnl), 0)::float AS value FROM butterfly_trades WHERE status='CLOSED' AND underlying='NDX' AND trade_date = CURRENT_DATE
SELECT NOW() AS time, COALESCE(SUM(pnl), 0)::float AS value FROM butterfly_trades WHERE status='CLOSED' AND underlying='XSP' AND trade_date = CURRENT_DATE
SELECT NOW() AS time, COUNT(*)::float AS value FROM butterfly_trades WHERE status='CLOSED' AND trade_date = CURRENT_DATE AND underlying IN ('SPX', 'NDX', 'XSP')

SELECT NOW() AS time, COALESCE(ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE pnl > 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 0), 0)::float AS value FROM butterfly_trades WHERE status='CLOSED' AND trade_date = CURRENT_DATE AND underlying IN ('SPX', 'NDX', 'XSP')
SELECT NOW() AS time, COALESCE(AVG(pnl), 0)::float AS value FROM butterfly_trades WHERE status='CLOSED' AND trade_date = CURRENT_DATE AND underlying IN ('SPX', 'NDX', 'XSP')

SELECT NOW() AS time, COALESCE(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (exit_time - entry_time)) / 60.0), 0)::float AS value FROM butterfly_trades WHERE status='CLOSED' AND trade_date = CURRENT_DATE AND underlying IN ('SPX', 'NDX', 'XSP')
SELECT NOW() AS time, COALESCE((SELECT (500 + realized_pnl)::float FROM daily_risk_state WHERE underlying='SPX' AND trade_date = CURRENT_DATE LIMIT 1), 500) AS value
SELECT NOW() AS time, COALESCE((SELECT (500 + realized_pnl)::float FROM daily_risk_state WHERE underlying='NDX' AND trade_date = CURRENT_DATE LIMIT 1), 500) AS value
SELECT NOW() AS time, COALESCE((SELECT (halted::int)::float FROM daily_risk_state WHERE underlying='SPX' AND trade_date = CURRENT_DATE LIMIT 1), 0) AS value
SELECT NOW() AS time, COALESCE((SELECT (halted::int)::float FROM daily_risk_state WHERE underlying='NDX' AND trade_date = CURRENT_DATE LIMIT 1), 0) AS value
SELECT NOW() AS time, COALESCE(MAX(pnl), 0)::float AS value FROM butterfly_trades WHERE status='CLOSED' AND trade_date = CURRENT_DATE AND underlying IN ('SPX', 'NDX', 'XSP')
SELECT NOW() AS time, COALESCE(MIN(pnl), 0)::float AS value FROM butterfly_trades WHERE status='CLOSED' AND trade_date = CURRENT_DATE AND underlying IN ('SPX', 'NDX', 'XSP')

SELECT id AS trade_id, entry_time, underlying, direction, wing_width, center_strike::float AS center_strike, entry_price::float AS entry_price, exit_price::float AS exit_price, pnl::float AS pnl, peak_value::float AS peak_value, exit_reason, ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (exit_time - entry_time)) / 60.0)::float AS duration_min FROM butterfly_trades WHERE status='CLOSED' AND trade_date = CURRENT_DATE AND underlying IN ('SPX', 'NDX', 'XSP') ORDER BY entry_time DESC
SELECT NOW() AS time, COALESCE(SUM(pnl), 0)::float AS value FROM butterfly_trades WHERE status='CLOSED' AND underlying='SPX'
SELECT NOW() AS time, COALESCE(ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE pnl > 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1), 0)::float AS value FROM butterfly_trades WHERE status='CLOSED' AND underlying='SPX'
SELECT NOW() AS time, COALESCE(AVG(pnl) FILTER (WHERE pnl > 0), 0)::float AS value FROM butterfly_trades WHERE status='CLOSED' AND underlying='SPX'
SELECT NOW() AS time, COALESCE(AVG(pnl) FILTER (WHERE pnl < 0), 0)::float AS value FROM butterfly_trades WHERE status='CLOSED' AND underlying='SPX'
SELECT NOW() AS time, COALESCE(SUM(pnl) FILTER (WHERE pnl > 0) / NULLIF(ABS(SUM(pnl) FILTER (WHERE pnl < 0)), 0), 0)::float AS value FROM butterfly_trades WHERE status='CLOSED' AND underlying='SPX'
SELECT NOW() AS time, COUNT(*)::float AS value FROM butterfly_trades WHERE status='CLOSED' AND underlying='SPX'
SELECT NOW() AS time, COALESCE(SUM(pnl), 0)::float AS value FROM butterfly_trades WHERE status='CLOSED' AND underlying='NDX'
SELECT NOW() AS time, COALESCE(ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE pnl > 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1), 0)::float AS value FROM butterfly_trades WHERE status='CLOSED' AND underlying='NDX'
SELECT NOW() AS time, COALESCE(AVG(pnl) FILTER (WHERE pnl > 0), 0)::float AS value FROM butterfly_trades WHERE status='CLOSED' AND underlying='NDX'
SELECT NOW() AS time, COALESCE(AVG(pnl) FILTER (WHERE pnl < 0), 0)::float AS value FROM butterfly_trades WHERE status='CLOSED' AND underlying='NDX'
SELECT NOW() AS time, COALESCE(SUM(pnl) FILTER (WHERE pnl > 0) / NULLIF(ABS(SUM(pnl) FILTER (WHERE pnl < 0)), 0), 0)::float AS value FROM butterfly_trades WHERE status='CLOSED' AND underlying='NDX'
SELECT NOW() AS time, COUNT(*)::float AS value FROM butterfly_trades WHERE status='CLOSED' AND underlying='NDX'
SELECT NOW() AS time, COALESCE(SUM(pnl), 0)::float AS value FROM butterfly_trades WHERE status='CLOSED' AND underlying='XSP'
SELECT NOW() AS time, COALESCE(ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE pnl > 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1), 0)::float AS value FROM butterfly_trades WHERE status='CLOSED' AND underlying='XSP'
SELECT NOW() AS time, COALESCE(AVG(pnl) FILTER (WHERE pnl > 0), 0)::float AS value FROM butterfly_trades WHERE status='CLOSED' AND underlying='XSP'
SELECT NOW() AS time, COALESCE(AVG(pnl) FILTER (WHERE pnl < 0), 0)::float AS value FROM butterfly_trades WHERE status='CLOSED' AND underlying='XSP'
SELECT NOW() AS time, COALESCE(SUM(pnl) FILTER (WHERE pnl > 0) / NULLIF(ABS(SUM(pnl) FILTER (WHERE pnl < 0)), 0), 0)::float AS value FROM butterfly_trades WHERE status='CLOSED' AND underlying='XSP'
SELECT NOW() AS time, COUNT(*)::float AS value FROM butterfly_trades WHERE status='CLOSED' AND underlying='XSP'
SELECT NOW() AS time, price::float AS value FROM spot_prices WHERE underlying='SPX' ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT NOW() AS time, price::float AS value FROM spot_prices WHERE underlying='NDX' ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT NOW() AS time, price::float AS value FROM spot_prices WHERE underlying='XSP' ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT NOW() AS time, price::float AS value FROM spot_prices WHERE underlying='$VIX' ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT exit_time AS time, SUM(pnl) OVER (ORDER BY exit_time) AS "SPX" FROM butterfly_trades WHERE status='CLOSED' AND underlying='SPX' AND $__timeFilter(exit_time) ORDER BY exit_time
SELECT exit_time AS time, SUM(pnl) OVER (ORDER BY exit_time) AS "NDX" FROM butterfly_trades WHERE status='CLOSED' AND underlying='NDX' AND $__timeFilter(exit_time) ORDER BY exit_time
SELECT exit_time AS time, SUM(pnl) OVER (ORDER BY exit_time) AS "XSP" FROM butterfly_trades WHERE status='CLOSED' AND underlying='XSP' AND $__timeFilter(exit_time) ORDER BY exit_time

SELECT direction, COALESCE(SUM(pnl) FILTER (WHERE underlying='SPX'), 0)::float AS "SPX P&L", COALESCE(SUM(pnl) FILTER (WHERE underlying='NDX'), 0)::float AS "NDX P&L", COALESCE(SUM(pnl) FILTER (WHERE underlying='XSP'), 0)::float AS "XSP P&L" FROM butterfly_trades WHERE status='CLOSED' GROUP BY direction ORDER BY direction

SELECT wing_width::text AS wing_width, COALESCE(SUM(pnl) FILTER (WHERE underlying='SPX'), 0)::float AS "SPX P&L", COALESCE(SUM(pnl) FILTER (WHERE underlying='NDX'), 0)::float AS "NDX P&L", COALESCE(SUM(pnl) FILTER (WHERE underlying='XSP'), 0)::float AS "XSP P&L" FROM butterfly_trades WHERE status='CLOSED' GROUP BY wing_width ORDER BY wing_width

SELECT COALESCE(exit_reason, 'unknown') AS exit_reason, COALESCE(SUM(pnl) FILTER (WHERE underlying='SPX'), 0)::float AS "SPX P&L", COALESCE(SUM(pnl) FILTER (WHERE underlying='NDX'), 0)::float AS "NDX P&L", COALESCE(SUM(pnl) FILTER (WHERE underlying='XSP'), 0)::float AS "XSP P&L" FROM butterfly_trades WHERE status='CLOSED' GROUP BY exit_reason ORDER BY (COALESCE(SUM(pnl) FILTER (WHERE underlying='SPX'), 0) + COALESCE(SUM(pnl) FILTER (WHERE underlying='NDX'), 0) + COALESCE(SUM(pnl) FILTER (WHERE underlying='XSP'), 0)) DESC

SELECT id AS trade_id, trade_date, underlying, direction, wing_width, center_strike::float AS center_strike, entry_price::float AS entry_price, exit_price::float AS exit_price, pnl::float AS pnl, peak_value::float AS peak_value, exit_reason, ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (exit_time - entry_time)) / 3600.0, 1)::float AS duration_hrs FROM butterfly_trades WHERE status='CLOSED' AND underlying IN ('SPX', 'NDX', 'XSP') ORDER BY trade_date DESC, entry_time DESC
